zh.lifeSummary: 當John FitzRichard De Burgh於1060年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾可納雷斯波洛時，他的父親Nigel de St. Sauveur III, 1st Constable of Chester, Baron of Halton17歲，母親Agnes de Widnes36歲。他和Magdalen Cecily FitzNigel至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1138年在英國英格蘭諾福爾可薩可林加姆享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John FitzRichard De Burgh于1060年出生在英国英格兰越可爾可納雷斯波洛时，他的父亲Nigel de St. Sauveur III, 1st Constable of Chester, Baron of Halton17岁，母亲Agnes de Widnes36岁。他和Magdalen Cecily FitzNigel至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1138年在英国英格兰諾福爾可薩可林加姆享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Burgh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from one or other of the ten English places named Burgh in northern England and East Anglia, or the six named Brough in Derbyshire, Nottinghamshire, Westmorland, and Yorkshire. All these are from Old English burg, burh, Middle English burgh ‘massive earthwork, fortification; manor, borough’. Compare Bury . The placename Burgh is pronounced as borough. The surname Brough arose equally from places now called Burgh and Brough, and is the more common form of the surname in modern Britain, where it is pronounced bruff or broof (/brʊf/). The Scottish surname was probably brought in from Yorkshire. For the surname in Ireland see Burke .

variants.name: Burke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Kieran, Siobhan, Aileen, Brennan, Brigid, Donovan, Liam, Murphy, Ulick, Aidan, Dermot.

English and Irish (of Anglo-Norman origin): habitational name from Burgh (Castle) in Suffolk, England. Burk represents an Anglo-Norman pronunciation of Old English burg, Middle English burgh ‘fortification’ (see Burgh ).

variants.name: Bury
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Bury in Lancashire (now part of Greater Manchester), or from some other similarly named place. The placename comes from the dative case, byrig, of Old English burh ‘fortified place’.

Walloon and French: habitational name from any of several places so named, in Wallonia (Belgium) and Oise (France). The placename is from Buriacum, the name of a Gallo-Roman estate, composed of the personal name Burius + the locative suffix -acum. This surname is also found in the Flemish part of Belgium.

variants.name: Brough
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of various English places called Brough or Burgh. See   Burgh  .
Scottish: habitational name from Brough in Harray (Orkney).
Americanized form of German   Brauch   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Burrow
meanings: topographic name for someone who lived by a castle or manor house, or in a town, especially a chartered town or borough (Middle English burgh, Old English burg ‘fortified place, borough, manor’), or a habitational name for someone who came from a place so named because it was a fortified town or near an ancient fort, such as Burrow (Leicestershire, Lancashire), Burrough Green (Cambridgeshire), Brough (numerous counties), and Peterborough (Northamptonshire); see also Burgh .

topographic name for someone who lived on a hill or near a mound (Middle English bergh, Old English beorg), or a habitational name for someone who came from a place so named, such as Burrow (Devon, Somerset). Middle English bergh became throughly confused with burgh in 1 above. Compare Burrough .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John FitzRichard De Burgh was born in 1060, in Knaresborough, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Nigel de St. Sauveur III, 1st Constable of Chester, Baron of Halton, was 17 and his mother, Agnes de Widnes, was 36. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Magdalen Cecily FitzNigel. He died in 1138, in Saxlingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John FitzRichard De Burgh est né en 1060, à Knaresborough, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Nigel de St. Sauveur III, 1st Constable of Chester, Baron of Halton, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Widnes, avait 36 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Magdalen Cecily FitzNigel. Il est décédé en 1138, à Saxlingham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John FitzRichard De Burgh 1060 in Knaresborough, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nigel de St. Sauveur III, 1st Constable of Chester, Baron of Halton 17 und seine Mutter Agnes de Widnes 36. Er hatte mit Magdalen Cecily FitzNigel mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1138 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Saxlingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John FitzRichard De Burgh è nato il nel 1060 nel Knaresborough, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Nigel de St. Sauveur III, 1st Constable of Chester, Baron of Halton, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Widnes, aveva 36 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Magdalen Cecily FitzNigel. Morì nel 1138, nel Saxlingham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John FitzRichard De Burghが1060年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアナレスボロウで生まれた時，父Nigel de St. Sauveur III, 1st Constable of Chester, Baron of Haltonは17歳，母Agnes de Widnesは36歳であった。彼はMagdalen Cecily FitzNigelとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1138年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクサクスリンガムで78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John FitzRichard De Burgh(이)가 1060년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 나레스버루에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nigel de St. Sauveur III, 1st Constable of Chester, Baron of Halton(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Widnes(은)는 36세였다. 그는 Magdalen Cecily FitzNigel(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1138년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 사스링함에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John FitzRichard De Burgh nasceu em 1060, em Knaresborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Nigel de St. Sauveur III, 1st Constable of Chester, Baron of Halton, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Widnes, tinha 36 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Magdalen Cecily FitzNigel. Ele faleceu em 1138, em Saxlingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John FitzRichard De Burgh родился в 1060 г. в местности наресбороую, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Nigel de St. Sauveur III, 1st Constable of Chester, Baron of Halton было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Widnes, 36. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Magdalen Cecily FitzNigel. Он умер в 1138 г. в местности сакслингхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 78 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John FitzRichard De Burgh nació en 1060, en Knaresborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Nigel de St. Sauveur III, 1st Constable of Chester, Baron of Halton, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Agnes de Widnes, tenía 36 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Magdalen Cecily FitzNigel. Murió en 1138, en Saxlingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 78 años.
